ddls:
CREATE TABLE "athletes" (
  "athlete_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each athlete */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the athlete */,
  "dob" TEXT /* Date of birth of the athlete */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the athlete */,
  "district_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the district the athlete belongs to */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the athlete */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the athlete */,
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* ID of the primary coach */,
  "medical_conditions" TEXT /* Any medical conditions or notes */,
  "emergency_contact" TEXT /* Emergency contact information */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the athlete record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the athlete record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("athlete_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_athletes_coach_id FOREIGN KEY ("coach_id") REFERENCES coaches ("coach_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_athletes_district_id FOREIGN KEY ("district_id") REFERENCES districts ("district_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "districts" (
  "district_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each district */,
  "district_name" TEXT /* Name of the district */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the district record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the district record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("district_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "event_name" TEXT /* Name of the event (e.g., 100m Sprint) */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of event (e.g., Track, Field) */,
  "distance" REAL /* Distance of the event (if applicable) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the event */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the event record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the event record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performances" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance record */,
  "athlete_id" INTEGER /* ID of the athlete performing */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event being performed */,
  "performance_time" TEXT /* Performance result (e.g., time, distance) */,
  "competition_date" TEXT /* Date of competition */,
  "competition_id" INTEGER /* ID of the competition */,
  "performance_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the performance (e.g., weather conditions, track conditions) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the performance record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the performance record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performances_competition_id FOREIGN KEY ("competition_id") REFERENCES competitions ("competition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performances_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performances_athlete_id FOREIGN KEY ("athlete_id") REFERENCES athletes ("athlete_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "competitions" (
  "competition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each competition */,
  "competition_name" TEXT /* Name of the competition */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the competition */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the competition */,
  "organizer" TEXT /* Name of the organizing body */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL of the competition's website */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the competition record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the competition record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("competition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coaches" (
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coach */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the coach */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the coach */,
  "district_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the district where the coach operates */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the coach */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the coach record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the coach record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coach_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_coaches_district_id FOREIGN KEY ("district_id") REFERENCES districts ("district_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "training_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each training session */,
  "athlete_id" INTEGER /* ID of the athlete attending the training */,
  "session_date" TEXT /* Date of the training session */,
  "duration" TEXT /* Duration of the training session */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the session */,
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* ID of the coach conducting the session */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the training session record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the training session record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_training_sessions_coach_id FOREIGN KEY ("coach_id") REFERENCES coaches ("coach_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_training_sessions_athlete_id FOREIGN KEY ("athlete_id") REFERENCES athletes ("athlete_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "equipment" (
  "equipment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each piece of equipment */,
  "equipment_name" TEXT /* Name of the equipment (e.g., running shoes) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the equipment */,
  "athlete_id" INTEGER /* ID of the athlete using the equipment */,
  "purchase_date" TEXT /* Date the equipment was purchased */,
  "warranty_expiration" TEXT /* Warranty expiration date */,
  "condition" TEXT /* Current condition of the equipment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the equipment record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the equipment record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("equipment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_equipment_athlete_id FOREIGN KEY ("athlete_id") REFERENCES athletes ("athlete_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric */,
  "athlete_id" INTEGER /* ID of the athlete associated with the metric */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event associated with the metric */,
  "best_performance" TEXT /* Best recorded performance for the athlete in the event */,
  "average_performance" TEXT /* Average performance over time for the athlete in the event */,
  "progression_rate" REAL /* Rate of improvement over time */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the performance metric record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the performance metric record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_athlete_id FOREIGN KEY ("athlete_id") REFERENCES athletes ("athlete_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for login */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for authentication */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role associated with the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message content of the notification */,
  "date_sent" TEXT /* Date the notification was sent */,
  "read_status" INTEGER /* Whether the notification has been read */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the notification record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the notification record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user providing feedback */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event associated with the feedback */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments or suggestions made by the user */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (e.g., 1-5) */,
  "date_submitted" TEXT /* Date the feedback was submitted */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the feedback record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the feedback record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)
